title: About me
name: Vito Depalo
bio:
I am a Landscape Architect graduated with Master's degree in Architecture and the post-degree diploma in Garden and Landscape Architecture in Florence (Italy).

I began my career as manager of public parks and gardens at Comune di Siena (Italy) spending 15+ years of experience in Public Works & Landscape Architecture for the Council Administration, managing all aspects related to gardens design and urban landscaping, also coordinating all maintenance activities.

After starting this company I have been working with a wide range of private clients and Council Administrations.

In 2014 I moved to London to gain experience in the UK industry working for two years at Garden Club London as responsible for delivering final schematics.

Currently, I'm based in London, in the beautiful Hampstead neighborhood, and I work with various collaborators on projects both in Italy and in London.
